---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: PrinceJonaa
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work?

## Domain
Which domain does this affect? (orchestration, routing, knowledge, edge, agents, etc.)

## Tier
Which tier is affected?
- [ ] NanoClaw (edge)
- [ ] RuFlo (brain)
- [ ] RuVector (knowledge)
- [ ] Cross-tier

## Design Considerations
- Does this add a new agent domain?
- Does this require LLM inference or can it be deterministic?
- Does this need new protobuf messages?
- Does this interact with ruflo?
